title: Liberty Exteriors and Roofs
address: 1096 4th Ave E, Owen Sound, ON N4K 2P2
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"arash moz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI81Ak5hSoUAAhRyURqQytLKrxs9nfIotqS6iwQj_gJZMDyuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I hired Brandon, owner of Liberty Exteriors and Roofs. to replace my garage and shed roof for standing seam metal roof. We signed the contract and paid the deposit back in October 2024. I kept following up as to when he was installing the new roof, since according to the contract, this job had to be completed by the end of November 2024. Brandon kept making excuses and finally the first week of December, when it had already started to snow, he brought the material. He then started to install the roof and to my surprise, he brought a cheap metal roof with exposed fasteners. When I told him that it was not standing seam, he said it was, but just a different type of standing seam. Even though I showed him that the main difference between standing seam roof and other metal roofs is the non exposure of the screws, he kept obviously lying, saying that it was standing seam, with exposed screws (a person like him running a roofing company and working in the industry for more than 10 years clearly should have known that). Since we had paid the totality of the contract, we decided to let him finish the job (that included the installation of the eaves, fascia and soffit), he just finish installing the last sheets of the cheap metal roof and took off. He put some sheets of soffit and that was about it. He left all the old plywood he replaced from the roof full of nails and screws next to my shed and a bunch of screws spread everywhere on the near by areas. Despite of asking him to come back and finish the job, even we were willing to accept the lower quality roof, he refused to come back. After examination, we even discovered that the job done was not performed with good workmanship. It will have to be all re done. Also, while we were waiting for the metal roof to arrive, he was trying to convince us he could do the siding of our home, and convince us to pay $150 dollars to use a program that according to him, allows to see the look of different types of sidings and windows. After paying, he never brought the so called deign program. Now, we are in the process of enforcing the contract and enter into legal action against this person. I do not recommend to hire this person and I warn you be careful with him trying to convince you that the bad reviews he has are not legit. He said those reviews are from enemies that try to put down his business. We were real customers and with the proofs we have, we will pursue legal action to recover our money.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_gIPsdQ&fid=0x0:0x860b184545036984"],"When":"2025-1-11"},{"Name":"mike gilmurray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfZEkcFIir7BT9gYCGoxIrM8f9e0H0uMQY4vfbPFGsceMNQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"0 stars. What should have been a straightforward repair turned into a frustrating process of chasing answers with little to no response. Unfortunately, this ended up being an all-around bad experience, and I would not recommend based on how poorly the communication was handled.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"RA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJV1Wcg6xXCm1oex_-IOYXb7zHsZ4TZeAM5bP3JSqh8AcuCtw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just had to write and say how please we are with the service and job
Chris from Service Master Restore in Grey Bruce, has done for us so far, and can hope and feel confident the next job of the siding
And other areas, will be just as great.

During the year end tornado/hail storm last year our
Property received a lot of damage from our vehicles to our house, shed and pool shed.
Due to covid effecting supply chains, then the snow season starting, we had to wait until
Just recently when we had good enough weather to start.

Chris had his team come out a day after our insurance contacted them, and they covered up all
The holes in our siding, and covered all the spots on our roof that were damaged from the storm.
Everything was fixed and sealed up good while we had to wait.  Chris’s assessment of the damage to the
Entire property was extremely detailed, noting things we never even seen, treating it as if it was his own home to be repaired.

Between now and then we had
A few instances where some heavy winds blew off more of our effected shingles off our roof,
But Chris and his contractors took care of everything needed right away.

Our roof is finished now, and what an amazing job they did.  The crew Chris had come out from NPR roofing
Were VERY professional, respectful and replaced our roof within days.  They immediately cleared everything away
That may get damaged, covered and tarped the entire area around the house where they were working, and each day they were finished,
Cleaned everything up 100%, and gave us an update on what’s been completed, and what’s being done next day.
We are really confident, the siding and other areas will go just as smooth and turn out just as great.

It’s bad enough going through an experience having all your structures damaged, vehicles heavily damaged, and having to worry
About what could be damaged while the winter season had us wait.  Chris and his Roofing Team made us feel 100% confident
With no worries, and we could not be happier with the entire experience so far, and with every worker that came to fix our home

We would definitely recommend Chris and Service Master to anyone, anytime, with no hesitations.

I had several quotes to choose from with one being ridiculous. If doing your roof I highly recommend Brenno.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lara Osland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqZakN8HJiCfikzdBK-Wr64G6_KillV3pjl6AmX2SGOzabdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"TERRIBLE Post-Installation SERVICE!! BRENO Does Not care about the Quality of JOB !!!!!!

After what I thought was a successful roof repair with Breno a couple years ago,  when my flat roof needed to be replaced I called Norbert and his team.  Just as before they swooped in and replaced the roof, seemingly all good.   I paid the bill and then it rained. And from that point on I have been nothing but disappointed with the service from Norbert and his team at Breno roofing.

Upon the first rainfall I was alarmed and within a few days called to complain about the large pool of water that just sits on the centre of my roof.  Initially, Zaneta the receptionist answered and told me that Norbert said it was normal and that he would call me later to discuss.  It's been over 2months now and I have yet to hear from Norbert despite my numerous calls, emails and texts to try and get some response to the situation.

Since that time I have had a contractor come in for an unrelated job and as he passed the window looking out onto the rooftop he couldn't help but make a comment on the poor installation and confirmed all my suspicions.  Perhaps Norbert would agree if he'd ever respond to my calls and actually come look at the work that his company had provided.

Be Warned - this company is not RELIABLE.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDu9OHvowE&fid=0x0:0x6d9e754969dd79a8"],"When":"2022-8-14"},{"Name":"Nicole Varga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWUb1fzfIsjkK-L6JTEgupmYf1As9Hsz7CHrq_oyE4YY-znA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our roof replaced by Breno Roofing last summer and couldn't be more pleased. After initial quote request, we received
the quote within couple of hours since they are using very advanced satellite technology without loosing time to drive out.
Norbert was very responsive and answered all our endless questions. We really liked having multiple options of different shingles
in the quote to choose from, without any pressure to go with a specific brand. Our home is very important to us and we thoroughly
selected Breno Roofing based on their high reputation and also because they are a certified roofing company by many shingle
manufacturers. We had our shingles delivered by a professional crew with a boom truck right up on the roof, so the crew is not
losing time to boost them up. The crew of 5 showed up before 7a.m on the day of installation and by 6 p.m, the work was completed.
We were absolutely thrilled how friendly and polite  everybody was, leaving our property clean and spotless after they finished. Norbert
stopped by during the day to check on the progress of the crew and answer our questions. This is how extraordinary customer service
looks like. We love our new GAF Timberline roof and will highly recommend Breno Roofing to all our friends. Excellent experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Otto Osz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzCzMzHT9M3Kkeq8k9GvLdGy3FQLSy7HsTzYzxz4rL2BONTdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great guys to deal with-answered all my questions promptly! We made our decision, booked our time and experienced solid communication from Justin leading up to the install.
When the big day came, the team arrived early, introduced themselves and kept communication up during the process. This left us informed and the questions we did have were answered professionally and personally.
Justin, big thanks to you and your team for doing such a great job! We are 3 months post-install and not only has the product (steel) and workmanship held beautifully against the weather, we have received many compliments.
I'm very happy with the product and the team who installed.
If we ever have another project like this, we will be reaching out.
Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Crane Harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWn39jb9WnkjXph11EO05bK_RyC8fmy9DvbbfVua78aR2WyXWE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Justin's JM Roof Company is fantastic and I recommend them very, very highly.
